title: 24:04 â January 8, 2024
body_text:
24:04 â January 8, 2024
New Forms Experience
You can now access forms in the new Forms section on the Client Centre
Forms and Manuals page
.
Figure 1: New Forms section on the Forms and Manuals page
The forms library was moved from the secure site to SharePoint Online. As a result, all forms have new URLs.
You can access forms via the Forms page search function or from links in the applicable manual(s). Please replace any bookmarks saved in your browser.
To search for a form using the Forms page search function, enter a form number or form name, then select
Search
. A results page displays in a new tab containing form links, instruction links (if available), and contact information relevant to the form.
Forms are sorted by date, with the most recently updated forms at the top.
Note: 	Links from manuals direct you to the search results page for the selected form.
Figure 2: Search Results page
Select the link on the search results page to view or download the form. PDFs continue to open in your browser and Word or Excel documents automatically download. If the form has completion instructions, you will find âView instructionsâ links to them in the Completion Instructions column.
Please continue to refer to internal revdates (found in each formâs footer), that indicate when the form underwent substantial content changes.
We are working to introduce the ability to favourite forms on the new platform. We will notify you when itâs available.
